title: FDA Commissioner Makary Resigns
headline: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary resigns effective Tuesday May 12, ending brief and tumultuous tenure marked by layoffs and industry conflict.
key_facts: Resignation effective May 12 2026, Brief and tumultuous tenure, Mass layoffs and political pressure, Public clashes with drugmakers, No successor named

title: BMS-Hengrui $15.2B Licensing Alliance
headline: Bristol Myers Squibb and China's Hengrui Pharma ink $15.2 billion licensing alliance covering 13 early-stage drugs.
key_facts: Up to $15.2 billion deal value, 13-asset licensing agreement, Second-largest China-to-West deal since early 2025 (behind AZ-CSPC $18.5B Jan 2026), BMS addressing pipeline/patent cliff risk

title: Lilly Foundayo & Zepbound Weight Loss Data
headline: Eli Lilly reports weight loss maintenance data for patients switching from injectables to oral Foundayo (orforglipron) or lower-dose Zepbound.
key_facts: Patients maintain weight loss switching to Foundayo from Novo Wegovy, Foundayo vs Zepbound switch: 11 lb average regain, Phase 3 trials completed, First-of-its-kind oral step-down pathway

title: Rigel Licenses Veppanu from Pfizer/Arvinas
headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals acquires license for Veppanu PROTAC breast cancer drug from Pfizer and Arvinas for $85 million.
key_facts: $85 million licensing deal, Veppanu (PROTAC protein degrader), Breast cancer indication, Pfizer/Arvinas exiting from disappointing asset

title: BioMarin Lays Off Amicus Staff
headline: BioMarin conducts layoffs at recently acquired Amicus Therapeutics post-acquisition integration.
key_facts: Post-acquisition integration layoffs at Amicus, Specific headcount not disclosed

title: Alkermes Lumryz Phase 3 Idiopathic Hypersomnia
headline: Lumryz (sodium oxybate) meets Phase 3 endpoint in idiopathic hypersomnia, validating Alkermes' $2.4B Avadel acquisition thesis.
key_facts: Phase 3 success in idiopathic hypersomnia, Avadel acquisition price $2.4 billion, Label expansion beyond narcolepsy

title: Hantavirus Outbreak Biotech Stock Surge
headline: Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship triggered speculative surges in vaccine-related biotech stocks, but analysts see no meaningful revenue opportunity.
key_facts: Moderna, Inovio, Novavax, Emergent all surged, Novavax -5% after early gains faded, Evercore ISI: no meaningful revenue opportunity, Baird: not highly transmissible threat

title: Isomorphic Labs Raises $2B+ AI Financing
headline: Isomorphic Labs raises over $2 billion in major AI-drug-discovery financing round.
key_facts: $2B+ financing raise, AI-driven drug discovery platform, Major AI-pharma investment

title: Bayer CEO Signals Aggressive M&A Return
headline: Bayer CEO signals careful but aggressive return to pharma M&A following Perfuse acquisition.
key_facts: Bayer M&A strategy signals aggressive pivot, Context: biosimilar competition impacting Eylea sales, Post-Perfuse acquisition M&A momentum

title: Iran War Supply Chain Disruption Risk
headline: Iran war disruptions emerging upstream of pharma supply chain, raising manufacturing/logistics concerns.
key_facts: Iran geopolitical tensions, Pharma supply chain impact potential, EU Critical Medicines Act provisional deal context

title: GSK-Sino Pharma Hepatitis B Deal
headline: GSK cuts deal with Sino Biopharmaceutical to broaden reach of hepatitis B drug bepirovirsen.
key_facts: GSK China licensing agreement, Bepirovirsen hepatitis B therapy, Geographic expansion strategy

title: Hims Telehealth Sales Miss
headline: Hims sales miss as telehealth competition intensifies in weight loss and other verticals.
key_facts: Hims revenue miss, Telehealth market competition surge, Weight loss and other verticals crowded

title: ViiV HIV Treatment Case Loss
headline: ViiV Healthcare loses HIV treatment case.
key_facts: Legal case loss for ViiV, HIV treatment litigation

title: RFK Jr. Continues Vaccine Safety Probe
headline: RFK Jr. continues to quietly probe vaccine safety and FDA decision-making processes.
key_facts: Ongoing vaccine safety investigations, Political pressure on regulatory processes
